title: Stir-Fried Potatoes with Chinese Seasoning
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that combines the richness of potatoes with the bold flavors of Chinese seasoning.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potatoes and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the Chinese seasoning and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the potatoes are coated in the seasoning.
Add the soy sauce and stir-fry for another 1-2 minutes, until the potatoes are tender and the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onion if desired.
